creator: fred@fperrin.net
text:
Hi,

My Email::Filter programmes started to warn() the following:

Module::Pluggable will be removed from the Perl core distribution in the next major release. Please install it from CPAN. It is being used at /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/Email/FolderType.pm, line 3.

So please add Module::Pluggable as a runtime dependency for Email::FolderType.

Cheers,
Fred.
